name: Chicken Cabbage Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 Half chicken breasts, cooked and cut into julienne strips
4 cups Red or green cabbage, shredded
1 package 3-ounce Japanese noodle soup mix (use noodles only and do not cook)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all dressing ingredients together in a jar. Shake to combine.
2. Let stand for 2 hours to blend flavors.
3. At serving time, combine chicken, cabbage, noodles, green onions, almonds, and sesame seeds in a salad bowl.
4. Toss with dressing.
5. Noodles will lose their crunch if allowed to stand.
6. Serves 6. Note: You may add the seasoning packet from the noodles to the dressing, if desired.
